headline: Apple's 50-year journey from garage to tech titan
summary: In early 1976 in California, Steve Wozniak had just completed the design of a computer circuit board he intended to share with fellow hobbyists at a prominent local club.  Apple's services business, which houses ​its App Store, Apple Music and its streaming service, has become a major ​driver of growth as its expanding base of devices brings in ​steady income from subscriptions and commissions on app sales.

content.title: Apple's 50-year journey from garage to tech titan
content.summary: In early 1976 in California, Steve Wozniak had just completed the design of a computer circuit board he intended to share with fellow hobbyists at a prominent local club.  Apple's services business, which houses ​its App Store, Apple Music and its streaming service, has become a major ​driver of growth as its expanding base of devices brings in ​steady income from subscriptions and commissions on app sales.

thumbnail.caption: FILE PHOTO: People walk by the Apple store on Fifth Avenue in New York

headline: Samsung, SK Hynix Jump More Than 11% to Lift Korean Market
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Chipmakers drove a rebound in South Korean stocks, as hopes that the Iran war may be nearing an end revived risk appetite. The Kospi Index soared nearly 9%, with Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. extending gains in afternoon trading to more than 13% and 11%, respectively. The small cap Kosdaq gauge also jumped more than 6%, briefly triggering a halt in program trading by the exchange.The rally follows a four-day slide that had pushed the equity benchmark to the brink of a

headline: Corti Ships Symphony for Medical Coding with more than 25% Accuracy Edge Over OpenAI and Anthropic
summary: Corti, the frontier lab for clinical-grade AI, today released Symphony for Medical Coding, an agentic model that outperforms OpenAI and Anthropic - as well as Amazon, Oracle, and Google - in medical coding by more than 25% in clinical accuracy benchmarks. It is now available via Corti's API to any team building AI-powered healthcare software.

headline: Why Microsoft’s Growth Isn’t Saving Its Stock
summary: Microsoft (MSFT) is doing something unusual. It's beating earnings, growing revenue at 18% year-over-year, and yet its stock is down 36% from its peak. That doesn't happen to companies this size without a reason. The reason, in this case, is one number: capital expenditure (capex). Pre-AI era capex consistently ran at 25-27% of operating cash flow. The most recent full fiscal year saw that ratio climb to 47.4.

content.title: Why Microsoft’s Growth Isn’t Saving Its Stock
content.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) is doing something unusual. It's beating earnings, growing revenue at 18% year-over-year, and yet its stock is down 36% from its peak. That doesn't happen to companies this size without a reason. The reason, in this case, is one number: capital expenditure (capex). Pre-AI era capex consistently ran at 25-27% of operating cash flow. The most recent full fiscal year saw that ratio climb to 47.4.

headline: DataGuard Appoints Andrew Foley as Chief Revenue Officer
summary: MUNICH & LONDON, April 01, 2026--DataGuard, a leading SaaS security and compliance software company, today announced the appointment of Andrew Foley as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Foley will lead DataGuard’s global go-to-market (GTM) organization, overseeing marketing, sales to new and existing customers, channel partnerships, and revenue operations. In his new role, he will focus on strengthening DataGuard’s industry leadership and scaling the company’s international presence.

content.title: DataGuard Appoints Andrew Foley as Chief Revenue Officer
content.summary: MUNICH & LONDON, April 01, 2026--DataGuard, a leading SaaS security and compliance software company, today announced the appointment of Andrew Foley as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Foley will lead DataGuard’s global go-to-market (GTM) organization, overseeing marketing, sales to new and existing customers, channel partnerships, and revenue operations. In his new role, he will focus on strengthening DataGuard’s industry leadership and scaling the company’s international presence.

thumbnail.caption: Andrew Foley, Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) at DataGuard.

headline: SpaceX files securities documents to go public: source
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX has filed confidential papers with US securities regulators for what could be the largest-ever public stock offering, a source familiar with the matter told AFP on Wednesday.The filing puts SpaceX on track to list on a public exchange by July, according to the Wall Street Journal, which cited people familiar with the matter.

content.title: SpaceX files securities documents to go public: source
content.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX has filed confidential papers with US securities regulators for what could be the largest-ever public stock offering, a source familiar with the matter told AFP on Wednesday.The filing puts SpaceX on track to list on a public exchange by July, according to the Wall Street Journal, which cited people familiar with the matter.

thumbnail.caption: Elon Musk's SpaceX has bold ambitions, including solar-powered, satellite-based data centers to develop and run future AI models (Brendan SMIALOWSKI)

summary: WASHINGTON, April 01, 2026--Babel Street, a global leader in mission-grade risk intelligence, today announced it is offering tailored threat intelligence briefings to security leaders across the technology sector immediately, at no cost, to those companies specifically named by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) in a warning issued Tuesday, March 31.

content.summary: WASHINGTON, April 01, 2026--Babel Street, a global leader in mission-grade risk intelligence, today announced it is offering tailored threat intelligence briefings to security leaders across the technology sector immediately, at no cost, to those companies specifically named by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) in a warning issued Tuesday, March 31.

headline: Stanley Druckenmiller Loaded Up on This Stock That’s Down 77%
summary: Stanley Druckenmiller is a legendary Wall Street investor, and there are very few investors on Wall Street with such an exceptional record. headline: Alphabet AI Push Raises Quantum And YouTube Questions For Long Term Story
summary: Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL) has introduced new AI models, including TurboQuant for AI memory compression and Lyria 3 Pro for advanced music generation on the Gemini platform. The company’s quantum team has warned that Bitcoin and Ethereum could face imminent risk from quantum attacks, urging faster security upgrades across crypto networks. YouTube is facing growing regulatory scrutiny in Australia and the UK over youth protection rules, adding pressure to Alphabet’s global compliance...

headline: Should You Hold on to Reddit Stock Despite Its 41% Dip in YTD?
